untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of trend line breaks and broadening top pattern geometry (upper/lower trend lines, price oscillation between them, failure to sustain directional movement). These pattern recognition elements cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/volume indicators and operators. Trend line identification requires pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available tools: modeled downward breakout on high volume (close < support level s1, volume > hvol_20) with reversal exit (crosses above sma_20). However, core pattern logic (trend line breaks, broadening geometry detection, stalled movement analysis) is untranslatable. The 'CONTEXT_DEPENDENT' direction reflects the pattern's ability to trigger both bullish and bearish setups depending on which trend line breaks first. Average decline of 15% suggests 2.5% stop loss with 30-day max hold based on typical pattern duration.
